nodes.context: Multiracial one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club based in Philadelphia, active nationwide in the US and Puerto Rico.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club; enemies of Wheels of Soul.
Rival gang; a member was killed by Wheels of Soul in 2009.
Rival motorcycle club; involved in a shooting with Wheels of Soul in 2010.
Rival gang; a member was killed by Wheels of Soul in 2011.
Rival gang involved in a 1979 shootout with Wheels of Soul.
Motorcycle club involved in a 2013 shootout with Wheels of Soul.
Motorcycle club; a member was killed alongside a Wheels of Soul member in 2014.

edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.
edges.context: The text lists Outcast Motorcycle Club as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.

edges.context: The text lists Sin City Titans as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.

edges.evidence_quote: On November 22, 1979, Wheels of Soul was involved in a shootout at Woodrow Wilson High School in Camden, New Jersey against rival gang Ghetto Riders.
edges.context: Wheels of Soul engaged in a shootout with Ghetto Riders in 1979.

edges.evidence_quote: Five members of the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club then entered the shop and told the Real Kings members that they were not supposed to be there. This led to a melee confrontation which erupted into a shootout, leaving the president of the Real Kings MC dead as well as two Wheels of Soul MC members.
edges.context: Wheels of Soul members confronted and shot at Real Kings members, resulting in deaths on both sides.

edges.evidence_quote: On August 30, 2014, Wheels of Soul member Steven Hicks was fatally gunned down while attending a party in Birmingham, Alabama, along with Wilbert Hawkins, a member of the Showstopper Motorcycle Club.
edges.context: A Wheels of Soul member and a Showstopper member were killed together, but no direct relationship between the clubs is stated.
